# String Equality

String equality comparison

```perl
$equal = $left eq $right;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$equal = $left eq $right;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$equal = $left eq $right;
```
